summary: Completed comprehensive testing of tutoring center management system. Backend APIs are fully functional with 92% success rate. Frontend admin panel works perfectly with all navigation, forms, and UI elements functioning correctly. Teacher functionality limited due to missing teacher user accounts.

minor_bugs.issue: Teacher balance endpoint returns 'No teachers found' when teachers exist but were deleted during testing
minor_bugs.impact: Teacher balance calculation may fail if teacher records are inconsistent

minor_bugs.issue: Unauthorized access returns 403 instead of expected 401
minor_bugs.impact: Minor HTTP status code inconsistency, security still works

integration_issues.issue: No teacher user accounts exist in the system for testing teacher functionality

design_issues.issue: Application follows design guidelines well with proper Turkish localization, modern UI components, and role-based theming

passed_tests: Backend API initialization and data seeding
Student CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Teacher CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Reference data endpoints (branches, lesson types, seasons, bank accounts)
Lesson operations (lessons, planned lessons, student courses)
Payment operations and teacher price management
Frontend login page loading and form elements
Admin dashboard navigation and card interactions
Students page navigation and search functionality

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (Admin functionality fully working, teacher functionality limited by missing test data)

action_item_for_main_agent: Create teacher user accounts in the system to enable full testing of teacher functionality. The system needs at least one teacher user with proper credentials to test the teacher dashboard, student management from teacher perspective, and teacher balance features. Consider adding a default teacher user during data initialization similar to the admin user.
